name: codexa
description: Codex-native codebase intelligence workflows, MCP setup, and edit accountability for repositories indexed by Codexa.

interface.shortDescription: Use Codexa context packets, change plans, and post-edit reviews inside Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codexa packages a repository-focused Codex workflow: load task briefs before edits, save change-plan snapshots for non-trivial work, review drift after edits, and request targeted verification from the local Codexa MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Use Codexa to brief this code change before editing.
Use Codexa to review the dirty tree against the saved change plan.
Use Codexa to recommend targeted tests for this task.
